subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1915-07-13 in Haifa
subcodes.first_line: Prayer possesseth great facility, inasmuch as it may be performed in its greater, lesser and intermediate forms [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: نماز خیلی سهولت دارد بجهت اینکه کبیر و صغیر و وسطی هست.  مصطفی رمزی پاشا می گفت من می خواهم
subcodes.subjects: @the state of prayer; dynamics of prayer, @law of obligatory prayer
